title: kayea megalocarpa
intro: Kayea megalocarpa, also known as the large-fruited Kayea, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Meliaceae. The Kayea megalocarpa plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Kayea megalocarpa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, making it a valuable resource for natural remedies, but more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
